description: Schema for a user wardrobe. Each item in 'items' represents one piece of clothing.

items.description: List of clothing items the user owns

item_fields.title: string — short name for the item
item_fields.category: string — tops | bottoms | dresses | outerwear | shoes | accessories
item_fields.style_tags: array of strings — style descriptors e.g. vintage, minimal, streetwear
item_fields.fit_notes: string — optional notes about how the item fits or how the user styles it

style_preferences.description: User's overall style preferences e.g. 90s, minimal, vintage

items.title: Baggy Levi's Jeans
items.fit_notes: high waist, very baggy through the leg

items.title: Oversized Brown Hoodie
items.fit_notes: very oversized, good for layering under coats
